name: Set-MarkdownOption

options.name: -BoldForegroundColor
options.description: Sets the foreground color for rendering bold Markdown text.

options.name: -Code
options.description: Sets the color for rendering code blocks and spans in Markdown text.

options.name: -Header1Color
options.description: Sets the color for rendering Header1 blocks in Markdown text.

options.name: -Header2Color
options.description: Sets the color for rendering Header2 blocks in Markdown text.

options.name: -Header3Color
options.description: Sets the color for rendering Header3 blocks in Markdown text.

options.name: -Header4Color
options.description: Sets the color for rendering Header4 blocks in Markdown text.

options.name: -Header5Color
options.description: Sets the color for rendering Header5 blocks in Markdown text.

options.name: -Header6Color
options.description: Sets the color for rendering Header6 blocks in Markdown text.

options.name: -ImageAltTextForegroundColor
options.description: Sets the foreground color for rendering the alternate text of an image element in Markdown text.

options.name: -InputObject
options.description: A PSMarkdownOptionInfo object containing the configuration to be set.

options.name: -ItalicsForegroundColor
options.description: Sets the foreground color for rendering the italics in Markdown text.

options.name: -LinkForegroundColor
options.description: Sets the foreground color for rendering hyperlinks in Markdown text.

options.name: -PassThru
options.description: Causes the cmdlet to output a PSMarkdownOptionInfo object containing the new configuration.

options.name: -Theme
options.description: Selects a theme containing predefined color settings. The possible values are Dark and Light .

args.name: -InputObject
args.description: A PSMarkdownOptionInfo object containing the configuration to be set.

description: Sets the colors and styles used for rendering Markdown content in the console.
